meaning: n.小提琴演奏者,小提琴家
examples: He had hoped to succeed as a violinist.
Rose's father was a talented violinist.
He has been described as the world's greatest violinist.
The contest also has an ambassadorial role for violinist Nicola Benedetti, who won the award in 2004.
He played Carnegie Hall at 13 and counts violinist Itzhak Perlman among his musical mentors.
